title: buchanania merrillii
intro: Buchanania merrillii, a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family, is commonly known as the Philippine walnut or Burmese walnut. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Buchanania merrillii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its preparations and dosages should be carefully considered under expert guidance.
